action.reasoning: Observation: The 6-model uniform ensemble achieved 75.29% accuracy (new best). We have ~28 minutes and 18 iterations left, so time is the binding constraint. Analysis: Adding more diverse checkpoints without training is the fastest way to improve. We have two unused noise-detector checkpoints (frozen-head ConvNeXt trained to avoid overfitting to noise) that provide additional prediction diversity. Including them in the ensemble is free and low-risk. Decision: Update predict.py to automatically discover and ensemble all available checkpoints (8 total including noise detectors), run a quick local sanity check, and submit evaluation.
